title: Unified Modelling Schema (UMS) 1.0
description: Validates a UMS YAML document representing a data model across graph, relational, multi-model, fact-based, and AI databases.

TypeDefinition.description: A single entity type or relationship type in the model.

Type.description: The name of the entity or relationship type.

Labels.description: Graph labels or relational table names for this type. Used on entity types.

Label.description: Short edge label for relationship types (e.g. LIKES, HAS). Used on relationship types.

Source.description: The source entity type of a relationship type.

Target.description: The target entity type of a relationship type.

RelationshipAnnotation.description: A human-readable annotation describing the relationship (e.g. 'Person likes Film').

PrimaryKey.description: The list of property names that form the primary key for this type.

Properties.description: The list of properties belonging to this type.

Relationships.description: The list of relationships this type participates in as source.

TypeReadings.description: Natural-language readings for the type as a whole, expressing its role in the domain.

IsRelationshipType.description: True if this type is an association or relationship type; false if it is an entity type.

then.description: Relationship types must carry a Label and RelationshipAnnotation.

else.description: Entity types must carry at least one Label.

PropertyDefinition.description: A single property on an entity or relationship type.

DataType.description: The portable UMS data type for this property.

Length.description: Maximum length for text properties. 0 indicates unbounded.

Readings.description: Natural-language ORM verbalisations for this property, expressing elementary facts.

RelationshipDefinition.description: A directed relationship between two types, with foreign key mappings and readings.

Source.description: The type that is the source (owning side) of this relationship.

Target.description: The type that is the target of this relationship.

From.description: The property names on the source type that form the foreign key.

To.description: The corresponding property names on the target type.

Readings.description: Natural-language ORM verbalisations for this relationship, in both directions where applicable.
